audit_items.proof_trace: Access control at L103-104 ensures only the registered auction contract (`s_auction`) can invoke `auctionCallback` with `from == address(this)`, meaning only `AuctionBidder.bid()` can trigger it. In that path, non-empty `data` is always `abi.encode(solution)` (L76), which is a valid `Call[]` encoding; `BaseAuction.bid()` guards the callback with `if (data.length != 0)` (L448) and passes data unchanged, so `abi.decode(data, (Call[]))` always succeeds.
